subcodes.title: Words spoken in Ramleh, 1913
subcodes.first_line: Following the revolution up to the present time, the people of Persia have made repeated attempts to elect people and form consultative assemblies, but the efforts have borne no fruit
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعد از انقلاب تا حال مکرّر اهل ایران بانتخاب نفوس و تشکیل دارالشّری پرداخته‌اند
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @constitutional revolution in Iran, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity
